name: Cobre
description: Colombian B2B real-time payments API processing $8B monthly across six major Colombian banks.

seo.title: Cobre — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Cobre: Colombian B2B real-time payments API processing $8B monthly across six major Colombian banks.

when_to_use: Real-time B2B bank transfer payments via Colombian banking network
Collecting and disbursing funds across six major Colombian banks
Embedding real-time Colombian payment rails into fintech or ERP products
High-volume B2B payables via programmable API in Colombia

review.verdict: Useful Colombian B2B rail if you operate there — narrow fit outside that geography and use case.
review.best_for: Colombian B2B operators needing real-time inter-bank payments
review.not_for: Consumer merchants or businesses outside Colombia
